### Rosewood London Appoints New Managing Director, Tessa Gorman
* [![](https://www.hotelexecutive.com/images/my-library-icon.jpg)
SAVE](javascript:void(0);)
* [![](https://www.hotelexecutive.com/images/icons/share.png)
SHARE](javascript:void(0);)
* [![](https://www.hotelexecutive.com/images/icons/resize.png)
TEXT SIZE](javascript:void(0);)
* [![](https://www.hotelexecutive.com/images/icons/print.png)
PRINT](javascript:void(0);)
* [![](https://www.hotelexecutive.com/images/icons/comment.png)
COMMENT](#comment)
* [![](https://www.hotelexecutive.com/images/pdf.png)
PDF](javascript:void(0);)
China, Hong Kong.January 17, 2024
Rosewood London has appointed Tessa Gorman as their new Managing Director. Tessa will bring a wealth of expertise in global luxury travel to her new role, which will start 1 January, 2024. The ultra-luxury hospitality brand's European debut, Rosewood London has transformed the Holborn ‘Midtown' area of London since its opening in 2013, ingratiating the property with the local community as well as with international travelers. The hotel has played a significant part in the London hospitality scene, introducing new concepts and partnerships alongside legacy activations such as The Pie Room and the Art Afternoon Tea, which are equally as popular today as at launch. Rosewood London recently celebrated its milestone tenth anniversary, with a series of innovative and inspiring partnerships to mark the occasion, and Tessa's appointment takes the established London hotel into a new era under her leadership.
With nearly 20 years' experience, Tessa has had a remarkable career within the luxury hospitality sector - inclusive of roles within Aman, Bvlgari and Cheval-Blanc, among others - and will be responsible for all aspects of the hotel operations for Rosewood London. She has held General Manager positions most recently at One&Only Portonovi in Montenegro, as well as Bvlgari Resort Bali and Phulay Bay, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve in Thailand. Prior to this, she acted as a hospitality consultant for brands, working on property launches from an operational perspective and managing ultra-luxury villa properties.
"It is a pleasure to welcome Tessa to the Rosewood family and to continue the success of Rosewood London in the UK," said Victor Clavell, Senior Vice President of Operations, EMEAC. "Tessa brings with her robust experience in luxury hospitality, and we're confident she will be a great asset to the team."
Commenting on her appointment, Tessa said: "I am thrilled to be joining the Rosewood family, a brand I have long admired, as Managing Director of Rosewood London. I am incredibly proud to be a part of this beautiful historic property, which has become an integral part of London life. After 17 years, I am returning to my home city, with its timeless blend of history and modernity and vibrant energy; and I look forward to joining the team as we continue to ignite the spirit of the destination into its next decade."

### About Marriott International
![](https://www.hotelexecutive.com/images/profile.png)Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAR) is a global leading lodging company based in Bethesda,Maryland, USA, with more than 4,200 properties in 80 countries and territories. Marriott International reported revenues of nearly $14 billion in fiscal year 2014. The company operates and franchises hotels and licenses vacation ownership resorts under 19 brands, including: The Ritz-Carlton®, BVlgari®, EDITION®, JW Marriott®, Autograph Collection® Hotels, Renaissance® Hotels, Marriott Hotels®, Delta Hotels and Resorts®, Marriott Executive Apartments®, Marriott Vacation Club®, Gaylord Hotels®, AC Hotels by Marriott®, Courtyard®, Residence Inn®, SpringHill Suites®, Fairfield Inn & Suites®, TownePlace Suites®, Protea Hotels® and MoxyHotels®. Marriott has been consistently recognized as a top employer and for its superior business ethics. The company also manages the award-winning guest loyalty program, Marriott Rewards® and The Ritz-Carlton Rewards® program, which together surpass 50 million members. For more information or reservations, please visit our website at[www.marriott.com](http://www.marriott.com), and for the latest company news, visit[www.marriottnewscenter.com](http://www.marriottnewscenter.com).

# Tessa Gorman appointed managing director of Rosewood London

Hotel 04 Dec 202317:26 by Emma Lake

bookmark_borderSave to Library

Tessa Gorman has been appointed managing director of Rosewood London, replacing Michael Bonsor, who will move on to lead the brand’s new Chancery Rosewood hotel.

Gorman will assume the role on 1 January 2024, having previously held roles within Aman, Bvlgari and Cheval-Blanc, among others. Most recently she held the position of general manager at One&Only Portonovi in Montenegro.

She said: “I am thrilled to be joining the Rosewood family, a brand I have long admired, as managing director of Rosewood London. I am incredibly proud to be a part of this beautiful historic property, which has become an integral part of London life.

“After 17 years, I am returning to my home city, with its timeless blend of history and modernity and vibrant energy; and I look forward to joining the team as we continue to ignite the spirit of the destination into its next decade.”

Victor Clavell, senior vice-president of operations, EMEAC, added: “It is a pleasure to welcome Tessa to the Rosewood family and to continue the success of Rosewood London in the UK. Tessa brings with her robust experience in luxury hospitality, and we’re confident she will be a great asset to the team.”

Bonsor had spent 10 years at Rosewood Hotels and Resorts, having joined the five-red-AA-star Rosewood London hotel as hotel manager in 2013. He was promoted to managing director of the Holborn property in 2017, the same year it won the Catey award for Hotel of the Year – Group.

He will now transfer to the Chancery Rosewood hotel ahead of its opening in London's Mayfair in 2025. The 144-room hotel is being developed in the Grade II-listed building that housed the US Embassy until 2017.

Hotel Hotels People Rosewood Hotel Group Rosewood London

## HRC

Mon Mar 30, 2026 ExCel London

HRC is the UK’s leading trade event for hospitality and foodservice and takes place on 30 March-1 April 2026 at Excel London as part of Food, Drink & Hospitality Week. Over three days, you’ll meet the people behind the products, connecting face-to-face with suppliers, brand owners and operators who are bringing the latest ideas to the table.

## The Caterer Supplier Awards

Thu Apr 16, 2026

The Caterer Supplier Awards celebrates the most creative and innovative businesses and brands from across the hospitality supply chain. Categories are judged by an independent panel of industry experts and the winners will be announced at the awards ceremony on 16 April 2026.

## The Caterer People Summit 2026

Thu May 14, 2026 58VE, London

The Caterer is bringing together HR hospitality leaders to learn, debate and collaborate on topics including artificial intelligence, burnout and how to effectively engage the board, to help protect your people, strengthen your teams and prove why HR is central to business success, even in a challenging climate.

## The Acorn Awards 2026

Sun Jun 7, 2026

The Acorn Awards, run in association with our headline sponsor CH&Co, recognise 30 of the brightest prospects in the hospitality industry under the age of 30. The awards, known as The Caterer’s 30 under 30, recognise people working in any sector of hospitality. Everybody is welcome to enter – you can nominate yourself or ask a colleague to nominate you and tell us about your achievements.

# New MD appointed to Rosewood London
Tessa Gorman will begin in the role in January, having previously worked for luxury brands including Aman and Bvlgari
by[Eamonn Crowe](https://www.boutiquehotelier.com/author/earmonn-crowe/)December 4, 2023December 4, 2023
[**TW]()[**FB](http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=https://www.boutiquehotelier.com/tessa-gorman-managing-director-rosewood-london/)[**LN](http://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?url=https://www.boutiquehotelier.com/tessa-gorman-managing-director-rosewood-london/)[**WHATSAPP](https://api.whatsapp.com/send?text=https://www.boutiquehotelier.com/tessa-gorman-managing-director-rosewood-london/)[**MAIL]()
![tessa gorman](https://www.boutiquehotelier.com/cloud/2023/12/04/maSEfFEh-tessa-gorman-1200x825.jpg "New MD appointed to Rosewood London 1")
**Rosewood London has announced the appointment of Tessa Gorman as the hotel’s new managing director.**
Gorman will begin her role on January 1 2024 and will be responsible for all aspects of hotel operations.
Her appointment follows the news that[Michael Bonsor](https://www.boutiquehotelier.com/michael-bonsor-the-chancery-rosewood/), current MD at Rosewood London, has been chosen to oversee sister property The Chancery Rosewood when it opens in 2025.
Gorman brings nearly 20 years of industry experience to her new role, having enjoyed an illustrious career within the luxury hospitality sector – inclusive of roles within Aman, Bvlgari and Cheval-Blanc, among others.
She most recently held a general manager position at One&Only Portonovi in Montenegro, and has previously headed up Bvlgari Resort Bali and Phulay Bay, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve in Thailand.
Prior to this, Gorman acted as a hospitality consultant for brands, working on property launches from an operational perspective and managing ultra-luxury villa properties.
Gorman commented:“I am thrilled to be joining the Rosewood family, a brand I have long admired, as managing director of Rosewood London. I am incredibly proud to be a part of this beautiful historic property, which has become an integral part of London life. After 17 years, I am returning to my home city, with its timeless blend of history and modernity and vibrant energy; and I look forward to joining the team as we continue to ignite the spirit of the destination into its next decade.”
Victor Clavell, senior vice president of operations, EMEAC at Rosewood Hotels & Resorts, added: “It is a pleasure to welcome Tessa Gorman to the Rosewood family and to continue the success of Rosewood London in the UK. Tessa brings with her robust experience in luxury hospitality, and we are confident she will be a great asset to the team.”
[> MD of The Chancery Rosewood named ahead of 2025 opening
](https://www.boutiquehotelier.com/michael-bonsor-the-chancery-rosewood/)

evidence.title: Rosewood London Promotes Emmanuele Selvaggi to Hotel Manager - Hospitality & Catering News
evidence.fetched_text:
Rosewood London Promotes Emmanuele Selvaggi to Hotel Manager - Hospitality & Catering News

### Rosewood London has promoted Emmanuele Selvaggi to Hotel Manager, effective 16th June 2025. In this elevated role, Emmanuele will continue to drive the hotel’s operational excellence and reinforce Rosewood London’s position as the preferred luxury destination in London.

Emmanuele Selvaggi, General Manager of Rosewood London

Emmanuele brings over 18 years of distinguished experience in luxury hospitality to his new position. He began his career with Four Seasons Boston in the Rooms Division and successfully progressed through the ranks across multiple international locations including Geneva, Doha, Prague and London over 15 years with the prestigious brand. His tenue with Four Seasons culminated as Hotel Manager at Four Seasons Florence before returning to London in November 2021 to join Rosewood London.

Since joining Rosewood London, Emmanuele has served as Director of Rooms, where he has been instrumental in driving exceptional results across the Rooms Division. Under his leadership, the Front Office team achieved the highest upselling revenue in 2024 since the hotel’s opening. His analytical approach and creative vision have led to numerous successful guest initiatives, while his commitment to personal service has significantly improved the hotel’s LQA scores and TrustYou ratings through increased use of guest recognition throughout the property.

Emmanuele is recognised for his exceptional leadership style, characterised by hands-on management and leading by example. His ability to build and develop high-performing teams, combined with his dedication to delivering memorable and seamless guest experiences, perfectly embodies Rosewood’s philosophy of Relationship Hospitality.

“Emmanuele has consistently demonstrated outstanding leadership and operational excellence during his time with us. His promotion to Hotel Manager is a natural progression that recognises his significant contributions to our success. His deep understanding of luxury hospitality and commitment to our team and guests make him the ideal leader to guide Rosewood London forward.” Tessa Gorman, Managing Director of Rosewood London

“I am honoured to take on this new role at Rosewood London, a property I have grown to love deeply over the past three and a half years. This promotion represents not just my personal journey, but the collective success of our incredible team. I look forward to continuing our tradition of exceptional hospitality while exploring new opportunities to enhance our guests’ experiences and strengthen our position as London’s premier luxury destination.” Emmanuele Selvaggi, Hotel Manager of Rosewood London

The ultra-luxury hospitality brand’s European debut, Rosewood London has been a cornerstone of the London hospitality scene since opening in 2013, transforming the Holborn area while maintaining strong ties with both the local community and international travellers.

# Emmanuele Selvaggi appointed hotel manager at the Rosewood London

People moves 13 Jun 2025 by Jungmin Seo

He was most recently director of rooms at the luxury Holborn hotel

Emmanuele Selvaggi has been promoted to hotel manager at the Rosewood London in Holborn.

Selvaggi brings over 18 years’ experience in luxury hospitality to the role, having started his career in the rooms division at Four Seasons Boston before progressing into senior positions across the group’s Geneva, Doha, Prague and London hotels.

He was also hotel manager at Four Seasons Florence before returning to London in November 2021 to join the Rosewood London, where he was most recently director of rooms. In 2024, he achieved the hotel’s highest upselling revenue since its launch in 2013.

Tessa Gorman, managing director of the Rosewood London, said: “Emmanuele has consistently demonstrated outstanding leadership and operational excellence during his time with us. His promotion to hotel manager is a natural progression that recognises his significant contributions to our success. His deep understanding of luxury hospitality and commitment to our team and guests make him the ideal leader to guide Rosewood London forward.”

Selvaggi added: “I am honoured to take on this new role at Rosewood London, a property I have grown to love deeply over the past three and a half years. This promotion represents not just my personal journey, but the collective success of our incredible team. I look forward to continuing our tradition of exceptional hospitality while exploring new opportunities to enhance our guests’ experiences and strengthen our position as London’s premier luxury destination.”

The Rosewood London is located in the former Grade II-listed headquarters of the Pearl Assurance Company and features 264 bedrooms, 44 suites, 11 event spaces and the Holborn Dining Room restaurant.

The Hong Kong-based hotel group is set to launch its second London property– the Chancery Rosewood – on 1 September.

---

### Events & Awards

## HRC

Mon Mar 30, 2026 ExCel London

HRC is the UK’s leading trade event for hospitality and foodservice and takes place on 30 March-1 April 2026 at Excel London as part of Food, Drink & Hospitality Week. Over three days, you’ll meet the people behind the products, connecting face-to-face with suppliers, brand owners and operators who are bringing the latest ideas to the table.

## The Caterer Supplier Awards

Thu Apr 16, 2026

The Caterer Supplier Awards celebrates the most creative and innovative businesses and brands from across the hospitality supply chain. Categories are judged by an independent panel of industry experts and the winners will be announced at the awards ceremony on 16 April 2026.

## The Caterer People Summit 2026

Thu May 14, 2026 58VE, London

The Caterer is bringing together HR hospitality leaders to learn, debate and collaborate on topics including artificial intelligence, burnout and how to effectively engage the board, to help protect your people, strengthen your teams and prove why HR is central to business success, even in a challenging climate.

## The Acorn Awards 2026

Sun Jun 7, 2026

The Acorn Awards, run in association with our headline sponsor CH&Co, recognise 30 of the brightest prospects in the hospitality industry under the age of 30. The awards, known as The Caterer’s 30 under 30, recognise people working in any sector of hospitality. Everybody is welcome to enter – you can nominate yourself or ask a colleague to nominate you and tell us about your achievements.

evidence.title: Emmanuele Selvaggi has been promoted Hotel Manager at Rosewood London
evidence.fetched_text:
Emmanuele Selvaggi has been promoted Hotel Manager at Rosewood London
[![Hospitality Net](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/HN-icon.svg)![Hospitality Net]()](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/)
[People](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/list/1-10/appointments.html)[Appointment](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/list/1-10/appointment/appointments.html)
# Emmanuele Selvaggi has been promoted Hotel Manager at Rosewood London
[![New World Hospitality ](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/picture/s_153033400/emmanuele-selvaggi.jpg?t=1369810630)](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/organization/17014335/rosewood-hotel-group.html)
[Rosewood Hotel Group](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/organization/17014335/rosewood-hotel-group.html)
13 June 2025
![Emmanuele Selvaggi]()
Rosewood London has promoted Emmanuele Selvaggi to Hotel Manager, effective 16th June 2025. In this elevated role, Emmanuele will continue to drive the hotel's operational excellence and reinforce Rosewood London's position as the preferred luxury destination in London.
Emmanuele brings over 18 years of distinguished experience in luxury hospitality to his new position. He began his career with Four Seasons Boston in the Rooms Division and successfully progressed through the ranks across multiple international locations including Geneva, Doha, Prague and London over 15 years with the prestigious brand. His tenue with Four Seasons culminated as Hotel Manager at Four Seasons Florence before returning to London in November 2021 to join Rosewood London.
Since joining Rosewood London, Emmanuele has served as Director of Rooms, where he has been instrumental in driving exceptional results across the Rooms Division. Under his leadership, the Front Office team achieved the highest upselling revenue in 2024 since the hotel's opening. His analytical approach and creative vision have led to numerous successful guest initiatives, while his commitment to personal service has significantly improved the hotel's LQA scores and TrustYou ratings through increased use of guest recognition throughout the property.
Emmanuele is recognised for his exceptional leadership style, characterised by hands-on management and leading by example. His ability to build and develop high-performing teams, combined with his dedication to delivering memorable and seamless guest experiences, perfectly embodies Rosewood's philosophy of Relationship Hospitality.
* [View Emmanuele Selvaggi's LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/emmanuele-selvaggi-5ab5912/)
* [Rosewood London](https://www.rosewoodhotels.com/en/london)
[![Rosewood Hotel Group](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/picture/s_153033400.jpg?t=1369810630)](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/organization/17014335/rosewood-hotel-group.html)
[Rosewood Hotel Group](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/organization/17014335/rosewood-hotel-group.html)
Organization
### Rosewood Hotel Group
Rosewood Hotels & Resorts manages a global collection of 31 one-of-a-kind luxury hotels, resorts, and residences in 18 countries.
[More](https://www.hospitalitynet.org/organization/17014335/rosewood-hotel-group.html)
